name: Origin Bancorp, Inc.
summary: PART I Our Company Unless the context otherwise requires, references in this Annual Report on Form 10-K to we, us, our, our company, the Company or Origin refer to Origin Bancorp, Inc., a Louisiana corporation, and its consolidated subsidiaries. All references to Origin Bank or the Bank refer to Origin Bank, our wholly-owned bank subsidiary. Origin Bancorp, Inc. is a financial holding company headquartered in Ruston, Louisiana.
